mapper.select: SELECT p.*, w.name as warehouse_name, s.name as supplier_name FROM inventory_products p LEFT JOIN inventory_warehouses w ON p.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN inventory_suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE p.stock <= p.min_stock AND p.min_stock > 0 ORDER BY (p.min_stock - p.stock) DESC

SELECT p.*, w.name as warehouse_name, s.name as supplier_name FROM inventory_products p LEFT JOIN inventory_warehouses w ON p.warehouse_id = w.id LEFT JOIN inventory_suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_products (product_code, name, spec, category, unit, price, stock, min_stock, warehouse_id, supplier_id, remark) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{name}, #{spec}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{minStock}, #{warehouseId}, #{supplierId}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_products SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE inventory_products SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_products WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_products WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_products WHERE stock <= min_stock AND min_stock > 0
